title: Georgia on My Mind
why_this_song: Georgia on My Mind by Ray Charles (1960) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 15 times; first heard in: "Georgia, Georgia"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Keeps Georgia on my mind (Georgia on my mind)"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Just an old sweet song"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Just an old sweet song"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Keeps Georgia on my mind (Georgia on my mind)"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Keeps Georgia on my mind (Georgia on my mind)
Other arms reach out to me
Still in peaceful dreams I see
The road leads back to you

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "georgia" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "georgia" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "mind" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "mind" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Still in peaceful dreams I see

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Georgia on My Mind" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Georgia on My Mind" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Georgia on My Mind", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Georgia on My Mind", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Georgia on My Mind" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Georgia on My Mind" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
